'''Tee-ubo Doole''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] scientist at [[ExGal-4]] on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. She was jealous of the attention the men at the station gave to [[Danni Quee]], and enjoyed [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]]. When she, along with [[Luther De'Ono]], [[Bendodi Ballow-Reese]], and [[Jerem Cadmir]] were sent out to investigate an incoming storm, Tee-ubo sacrificed her [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]] pack and her life to Cadmir, shooting herself before the insurmountable noxious fumes being emitted by [[dweebit]]s brought to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]] [[Yomin Carr]] killed her.<ref name="VP" />
